column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear {username}, Unfortunately we have to deactivate {customerName} account.Due to document is not verified.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value: Dear {username}, Unfortunately we have to deactivate {customerName} account.Due to document is not verified.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLMNOTIFICATIONEVENT WHERE eventid=40;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid = 43;

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear Customer,We regret to inform you that your service has been deactivated.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your service has been deactivated.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid="9";

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear Valued Customer,Your case has been registered with Ticket ID {caseNumber}.Case resolution process has been started accordingly. Thank You.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thanks for reaching out to us! We will surely help you

with your query.

Your case has registered with Ticket ID: {caseNumber}

Your compliant has been forwarded to the concerned

personnel and resolution process has been started.

We will reach out to you for any further assistance.

We are very sorry for the inconvenience caused.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to

contact us at Email connect@adoptnet.tech

Thank You.:

AdoptNetTech

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLMNOTIFICATIONEVENT WHERE eventid=49;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid = 49;

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear Customer, Payment of Rs. {paymentAmount} for {username} is received and verified. For support call 014235888

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is a confirmation that we've just received your recent payment of Rs. {paymentAmount} on {paymentDate} against Receipt No: {reciptNo} subscribed under the User ID: {username}

We would like to thank you for your continuous trust towards our service.

You can login to our Customer Portal https://selfcare.subisu.net.np/ and access your Account, Change Password, Plan details and much more activity at your convenience.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact us at Email support@subisu.net.np   or connect us at: 01-4235888 / 9801235888

REFER and WIN 1 Month bonus Subscription
Browse www.subisu.net.np and www.cleartv.com.np to grab our latest offers.

Thank You
Adopt NetTech.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLMNOTIFICATIONEVENT WHERE eventid=50;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid = 50;

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear Valued Customer {username}, Your case registered with Ticket ID {caseNumber} has been resolved. In case of any issues kindly revert back to us. Thank You.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear Valued Customer {username},

Thank you for your patience and your case registered with Ticket ID: {caseNumber} has been eventually resolved.

We are very sorry for the inconvenience caused and we will make sure uninterrupted service onwards with utmost dedication.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact us at Email support@subisu.net.np   or connect us at: 01-4235888 / 9801235888

REFER and WIN 1 Month bonus Subscription
Browse www.subisu.net.np and www.cleartv.com.np to grab our latest offers.

Thank You.
Adopt NetTech.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid="50";

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear Valued Customer {username},

Thank you for your patience and your case registered with Ticket ID: {caseNumber} has been eventually resolved.

We are very sorry for the inconvenience caused and we will make sure uninterrupted service onwards with utmost dedication.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact us at Email connect@adoptnet.tech

Thank You.
Adopt NetTech.

column.value:

We would like to thank you for your continuous trust towards our service.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact us at Email connect@adoptnet.tech

Thank You
Adopt NetTech.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblcommonlist t WHERE t.list_text = 'Close All Tickets' AND t.list_type = 'TERMINATION_ACTION';

column.name: VALUE
column.value: Call Not Received,Call Not Connected,Call Barrier,Incoming Call Block,Call On Hold,Call Not Reachable,Call Rejected,Call Not Exist,Call Disconnected,Phone Switch Of,Customer Busy,Language Barrier,Wrong No

column.name: VALUE
column.value: Not satisfied,Slow Browsing,Internet Not Working, Wifi Range Issue,Frequent Disconnection,Optical Power Issue,Online Gamig,ONU Related Issue,Channel Missing,Channel Scratches,No Signal,Unknown About Functionality

column.name: VALUE
column.value: Re-open ticket,Sales Problem domain,Technical Problem domain

column.name: VALUE
column.value: Quick Resolution,Friendly Staff,Knowledgeable support, fast response,Friendly staff, resolved issue

column.name: VALUE
column.value: Confusing instructions, no resolution,Slow response, unhelpful agent

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBLNOTIFICATIONEMPLATE WHERE templateid = 54;

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear {customerName},We regret to inform you that your payment of {currencySymbol}{paymentAmount} through {paymentMode} has unfortunately failed. - Adopt NetTech

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear {customerName},

We regret to inform you that your payment of {currencySymbol}{paymentAmount} through {paymentMode} has unfortunately failed.

- Adopt NetTech

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO adoptconvergebss.tblcustomers (username,password,firstname,lastname,email,cstatus,last_login_time,failcount,last_password_change,accountnumber,accounttype,birthdate,country,cui,customertype,gender,imsi,phone,subscriberpackage,subscriberpackageid,createdate,expirydate,laststatuschangedate,NEXTBILLDATE,LASTBILLDATE,BILLDAY,outstandingbalance,partnerid,ASNNumber,BNGRouterInterface,BNGRouterName,IPPrefixes,IPV6Prefixes,LANIP,LANIPV6,LLAccountID,LLConnectionType,LLExpiryDate,LLMedium,LLServiceID,MACADDRESS,PeerIP,POOLIP,QOS,RDExport,RDValue,VLANID,VRFName,VSIID,VSIName,WANIP,WANIPV6,billentityname,purchaseorder,remarks,addparam1,addparam2,addparam3,addparam4,parentcustid,invoiceoption,oldpassword1,oldpassword2,oldpassword3,firstactivationdate,allowedipaddrs,selfcarepwd,title,custname,contactperson,pan,gst,aadhar,mactelflag,mobile,altmobile,altphone,altemail,fax,resellerid,salesrepid,deposit,voicesrvtype,didno,childdidno,intercomno,intercomgrp,onlinerenewalflag,voipenableflag,custcategory,walletbalance,networktype,oltslotid,oltportid,strconntype,stroltname,strslotname,strportname,createdbystaffid,lastmodifiedbystaffid,servicearea_id,network_device_id,onuid,is_deleted,defaultpoolid,otp,otpvalidate,createbyname,updatebyname,lastmodifieddate,latitude,longitude,url,gis_code,voiceProvision,salesremark,servicetype,next_team_hir_mapping,caf_approve_status,MVNOID,country_code,passport_no,dunning_category,plangroupid,tin_no,invoice_type,calendartype,BUID,plan_purchase_type,lead_source,feasibility_required,isorgcust,branchid,cafno,isinvoicestop,istrialplan,VALLEY_TYPE,CUSTOMER_AREA,lco_id,CUSTOMER_TYPE,CUSTOMER_SUB_TYPE,CUSTOMER_SECTOR,CUSTOMER_SUB_SECTOR,is_from_pwc,popid,lead_id,lead_no,nas_port,framed_ip,dunning_type,dunning_sector,dunning_sub_sector,dunning_sub_type,ezybill_customers_id,ezybill_account_number,ezybill_stock_id,feasibility,feasibility_remark,customerlabel,staffid,framed_ip_bind,ip_pool_name_bind,current_assignee_id,business_type,reject_reason_id,reject_sub_reason_id,reject_caf_time,additionalemail,salesrepresentative,skypeid_imid,organisation,rating,automaticnotification,locationlevel1,locationlevel2,locationlevel3,locationlevel4,ponumber,customerbillingid,businessunit,subbusinessunit,is_dunning_activate,dunning_activate_for,last_dunning_date,billable_customer_id,is_dunning_enable,dunning_action,oltid,masterdbid,splitterid,is_notification_enable,parent_experience,department,maxconcurrentsession,sla_time,sla_unit,nextfollowupdate,nextfollowuptime) 17:49:52','A202431710937191687',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,'Prepaid',NULL,NULL,'',NULL,NULL,'2024-03-20 17:49:52','2024-03-20 17:49:51','2024-03-20 17:49:52','2024-03-20 17:49:52','','',NULL,NULL,0,'','',NULL,NULL,1,'+91','','Gold',NULL,'',NULL,'English',NULL,'individual',NULL,NULL,0,19,'',0,0,'','',NULL,'','','','',0,0,NULL,NULL,'','','','',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,'organization',NULL,'','',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,'',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tblstaffuser DROP COLUMN mvnoDeactivationFlag;

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tblcustomers DROP COLUMN mvnoDeactivationFlag;

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tblmmvno DROP COLUMN mvnoDeactivationFlag;

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada
changeSet.sql: -- Find the maximum existing SERVICEID SELECT @max_serviceid := MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice;

-- Insert duplicate records with incremented SERVICEID starting from @max_serviceid + 1 INSERT INTO tblclientservice (SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID) SELECT IFNULL((SELECT MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice), @max_serviceid) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SERVICEID) AS SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, 1 AS MVNOID FROM tblclientservice WHERE MVNOID='2';
-- Optional: View the inserted duplicate records SELECT * FROM tblclientservice WHERE SERVICEID > @max_serviceid;

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada
changeSet.sql: DELETE t1 FROM tblclientservice t1 JOIN ( SELECT name, MVNOID, MAX(serviceid) AS max_serviceid FROM tblclientservice GROUP BY name, MVNOID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) t2 ON t1.name = t2.name AND t1.MVNOID = t2.MVNOID AND t1.serviceid < t2.max_serviceid;

changeSet.author: Vikas Anand

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_pairs_count FROM ( SELECT mv.MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'promisetopay_renew_count' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID ) ) AS missing_pairs;

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tblclientservice (SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice), 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS SERVICEID, 'promisetopay_renew_count' AS NAME, '1' AS VALUE, mv.MVNOID AS MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'promisetopay_renew_count' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID );

changeSet.author: Vikas Anand

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_pairs_count FROM ( SELECT mv.MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'allowrenewalnumberoftime' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID ) ) AS missing_pairs;

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tblclientservice (SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice), 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS SERVICEID, 'allowrenewalnumberoftime' AS NAME, '0' AS VALUE, mv.MVNOID AS MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'allowrenewalnumberoftime' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID );

changeSet.author: Vikas Anand

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_pairs_count FROM ( SELECT mv.MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'WORKFLOW_AUTOMATIC_ASSIGN' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID ) ) AS missing_pairs;

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tblclientservice (SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice), 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS SERVICEID, 'WORKFLOW_AUTOMATIC_ASSIGN' AS NAME, FALSE AS VALUE, mv.MVNOID AS MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'WORKFLOW_AUTOMATIC_ASSIGN' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID );

changeSet.author: Vikas Anand

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_pairs_count FROM ( SELECT mv.MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'RENEW_BY_BUSINESS_PROMOTION_ONLY' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID ) ) AS missing_pairs;

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tblclientservice (SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SERVICEID) FROM tblclientservice), 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS SERVICEID, 'RENEW_BY_BUSINESS_PROMOTION_ONLY' AS NAME, '1' AS VALUE, mv.MVNOID AS MVNOID FROM tblmmvno mv WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice cs WHERE cs.NAME = 'RENEW_BY_BUSINESS_PROMOTION_ONLY' AND cs.MVNOID = mv.MVNOID );

changeSet.author: Payal Thummar
changeSet.comment: Add foreign key constraint to tblcustquotadtls for custpackageid
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tblcustquotadtls ADD CONSTRAINT fk_custpackageid FOREIGN KEY (custpackageid) REFERENCES tblcustpackagerel(custpackageid);

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="PAN_NUMBER_LENGTH";

column.name: serviceid
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(serviceid + 1) from tblclientservice t order by serviceid desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="PAN_NUMBER_LENGTH" and MVNOID="1";

column.name: serviceid
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(serviceid + 1) from tblclientservice t order by serviceid desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="PAN_NUMBER_DOC_APPROVAL" and MVNOID="2";

column.name: serviceid
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(serviceid + 1) from tblclientservice t order by serviceid desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice Where NAME ='NMS_INTEGRATION_ENABLE';

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice Where NAME ='LEAD_CAF_VISIBILITY_RISTRICT';

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

changeSet.author: Akshay Mewada

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblclientservice WHERE MVNOID = 1 AND NAME = 'LEAD_CAF_VISIBILITY_RISTRICT'

changeSet.sql: SET @row := (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SERVICEID), 0) FROM tblclientservice);

INSERT INTO tblclientservice ( SERVICEID, NAME, VALUE, MVNOID ) SELECT @row := @row + 1, src.NAME, src.VALUE, mvnos.MVNOID FROM ( SELECT NAME, VALUE FROM tblclientservice WHERE MVNOID = 1 AND NAME = 'LEAD_CAF_VISIBILITY_RISTRICT' ) src JOIN tblmmvno mvnos ON mvnos.MVNOID <> 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice existing WHERE LOWER(TRIM(existing.NAME)) = LOWER(TRIM(src.NAME)) AND LOWER(TRIM(existing.VALUE)) = LOWER(TRIM(src.VALUE)) AND existing.MVNOID = mvnos.MVNOID );

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="WORKFLOW_HYBRID_ASSIGN" and MVNOID=2;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice Where NAME ='FEEDBACKFORM_FREQUENCY' and MVNOID=1;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice Where NAME ='FEEDBACKFORM_FREQUENCY' and MVNOID=2;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="WORKFLOW_HYBRID_ASSIGN" and MVNOID=1;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

changeSet.author: Varun Kumar

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblclientservice WHERE NAME = 'NMS_ENABLE'

changeSet.sql: UPDATE tblclientservice SET VALUE = 'false' WHERE NAME = 'NMS_ENABLE'

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="IS_WORKFLOW_ALL_ASSIGN" and MVNOID=1;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from tblclientservice where name="IS_WORKFLOW_ALL_ASSIGN" and MVNOID=2;

column.name: SERVICEID
column.valueNumeric: (select COALESCE(SERVICEID + 1) from tblclientservice t order by SERVICEID desc limit 1)

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblclientservice WHERE name = 'NMS_INTEGRATION_ENABLE'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN DATA_TYPE = 'varchar' OR DATA_TYPE = 'character varying' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name = 'tblstaffuser' AND column_name = 'department' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblcommonlist t WHERE t.list_text = 'Network Details' AND t.list_type = 'CAF_ACTION';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblmvasplan WHERE vas_name = 'isdefault' and mvnoid = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblcommonlist t WHERE t.list_text = 'Upload All Documents' AND t.list_type = 'CAF_ACTION';

changeSet.author: Nishit Bhandva
changeSet.sql:
SET @next_serviceid := (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(serviceid), 0) FROM tblclientservice);
INSERT INTO tblclientservice (serviceid, name, value, MVNOID) SELECT @next_serviceid := @next_serviceid + 1, base.name, base.value, m.MVNOID FROM ( SELECT name, value FROM tblclientservice t WHERE serviceid = ( SELECT MIN(serviceid) FROM tblclientservice WHERE name = t.name) ) base JOIN tblmmvno m ON 1 = 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tblclientservice t2 WHERE t2.MVNOID = m.MVNOID AND t2.name = base.name);
